steps.title: Set the function equal to zero
steps.content: To find the x-intercepts, set $$y=0$$. Since the constant factor 4 is not zero, we have $$(x-12)(x+6)(x+5)=0$$.

steps.title: Solve each factor for x
steps.content: Setting each factor equal to zero gives $$x-12=0$$ -> $$x=12$$, $$x+6=0$$ -> $$x=-6$$, and $$x+5=0$$ -> $$x=-5$$. Therefore the x-intercepts occur at $$x=12$$, $$x=-6$$, and $$x=-5$$; one of them is $$x=12$$. The answer is 12.
